name: set_case_analysis
short_description: Specify that an input is 1, 0, rising or falling
full_help:
set_case_analysis

Description: 
Specify that an input is 1, 0, rising or falling

Syntax: 
set_case_analysis  [-quiet] [-verbose] <value> <objects>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <value>     Logic value on the pin: Values: 0, 1, rising, falling, zero, 
              one, rise, fall
  <objects>   List of ports or pins

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
